verses.text: Tua ciangin Moses in Israel-te khempeuh tungah a thugen zomlai hi
Amah in amaute kiangah, “Tuni-in kei kum za leh kum sawmnih ka pha ta a, keima ut bangin ka gamtangzo nawn kei hi. Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Hih Jordan galkhatah na pai kei ding hi,’ hong cizo hi

Topa na Pasian mahmah uh note' mai-ah hong galkah ding hi. Note' mai-ah hih minamte amah in susia ding a, note in amaute na suankhia ding uh hi. Topa' gensa bangin note' mai-ah Joshua hong galkah ding hi
Topa in amaute a suksiat lai-in, Amor kumpi Sihon leh Og tung leh amau' leitang tungah a bawl bangin amaute tungah bawl ding hi
Topa in note tungah amaute hong pia ding a, note kong piak thupiaknate khempeuh tawh kizui-in amaute tungah na bawl ding uh hi
Thahat un la, hang un. Lau kei un la, amaute kihta kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh hong paipa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi. Note hong cimawhsaklo ding a, hong nusialo ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Moses in Joshua samin, Israel-te khempeuh muhin ama kiangah, “Thahat in la hang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah piak dingin Topa in amau' pute pate tungah a ciamsa leitangah hih mite tawh na pai ding a, nangmah in tua leitang amaute na ngahsak ding hi
Na mai-ah a paipa pen Topa ahi hi. Amah in nang hong ompih ding a, nang hong cimawhsak loin, zong hong nusialo ding hi. Lau kei in la, lungkia kei in,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Kum Sagih Simin Sim ding Thukham

verses.text: Moses in hih Thukham gelhin Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mi siampite leh upate khempeuh tungah a pia hi
Moses in amaute thu pia-in, “Kum sagih a cin' sim, a kisehsa suahtaksakna hun, buk pawi hunin
amah in a teelna mun Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah a kilak dingin Israel-te khempeuh a pai uh ciangin, amau' zakin Israel-te khempeuh mai-ah hih thukham na sim ding uh hi

Jordan galkhatah a luah dingin na paina uh gamah na nuntak laitengun amaute in a thu za-in Topa na Pasian uh zahtak ding a theihna ding, leh hih thukham thute khempeuh limtakin a sep theihna ding, leh hih thu a thei nailo amau' tate in Topa na Pasian uh zahtak ding a theihna dingun, numei, pasal, leh naupangte, leh na khuapite uh sunga om peemtate, mi khempeuh khawm un,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, na sih ding hun hong nai ta hi. Joshua sam in la, amah ka sawl theihna dingin kikhopna buk sungah hong om un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses leh Joshua pai-in kikhopna buk sungah va om uh hi
Tua ciangin meii khuam omna puanbuk sungah Topa kilang hi. Meii khuam, puanbuk kong gei-ah a ding hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, na pu na pate kiang a zuan ding na hita hi. Nang na om nawnloh ciangin hih mite pen na paina uh mite lakah a gamsung pasian-te uh tawh paktat ding uh a, amaute in kei hong nusia-in amaute tawh ka bawl ka thuciamna uh siasak ding uh hi

Tua hun ciangin amaute tungah ka sin so-in, amaute nusia-in ka mai ka seel ding a, amaute beimang ding uh hi. Tua ni ciangin amaute in, ‘Eite' lakah i Pasian a omloh manin hih siatnate i tungah hong tung hilo ahi hiam?’ a cih theihna dingun amaute tungah siatna leh gimna tampi tung ding hi
Amaute, pasian dangte lamah kihei uh ahih manin amau' gamtatnasa siatnate khempeuh hangin tua hun ciangin ka mai ka seel taktak ding hi
“Tua ahih ciangin hih lai gelh in la, Israel mite hilh in. Hih la, kei-a' dingin Israel mite' langkhatah teci a suah theihna dingin amaute tungah hilh in

Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate uh tungah piak dinga ka kiciamna, bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na gamah amaute tun'pih khinin, amaute in ne-in khamin a thau khit uh ciangin, pasian dangte a bia dingin kihei-in kei hong simmawhin ka thuciamna siasak ding uh hi

Siatna leh haksatnate amaute tungah a tun' ciangin hih la, teci-in amaute' langkhatah pang ding hi (bang hang hiam cih leh a suanlekhakte un mangngilhlo ding uh hi); bang hang hiam cih leh piak dingin ka kiciam leitangah amaute ka paipih ma-in, amau' vaihawm kholh a ngimnate uh ka thei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua ni mahin Moses in hih la gelh a, Israel mite a hilh hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Nun' tapa Joshua sawlin, “Thahat in la hang in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute piak dingin ka kiciam leitang tungah Israel mite na paipih ding a, nang tawh kong om ding hi,” a ci hi
Moses in a bei dongin hih Thukham kammalte laibu sungah a gelh a man ciangin
Moses in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mite thu pia a
“Hih Thukham laibu la un la, note' langkhatah teci dingin a om theihna dingin Topa na Pasian uh Thuciamna Singkuang gei-ah koih un

Bang hang hiam cih leh a lehdo mite leh a lungkhauh thei mite na hihna uh ka thei hi. En un, note tawh kei a nungta khawm laipi mahin, tuni-in Topa na lehdo khin uh hi. Ka sih khit ciangin bangzah takin lehdozaw lai ding na hi uh hiam
Hih thute amaute' bilah genin, amau' langkhatah teci a pang dingin vantung leh leitung ka sap theihna dingin na minam upate uh leh na uliante khempeuh uh kei kiangah hong khawm un

Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sih khit ciangin note sia gamtatin, note kong sawlna lampi panin na pial taktak ding lam uh ka thei hi. Note' sepna tawh amah hehsakin, Topa' muhna-ah a sia gamta ding na hih manun, hong pai ding hunte-ah, note' tungah gimna hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin hih la malte a bei dongin Israel a kikhawm khempeuhte' zakin Moses in gen a,
